These cases come alongside executive departures, stalled autonomous test activity in California, and missed...

Gerber's comments come on the heels of a legal setback for the EV maker involving its Autopilot system. "Tesla people seem triggered that I think it's a bad i

items.title: 特斯拉竞争对手XPeng扩大机器人业务，建造广州工厂，生产Optimus挑战者IRON
items.summary: XPeng Inc. (NYSE:XPEV) 计划在中国建造新的人形机器人工厂，随着全球科技行业对机器人技术的重视。 2026年底生产目标 公司将在今年第一季度开始在广州，中国，建造其1.18万平方米的工厂，并计划在今年年底前大规模生产其IRON人形机器人，CnEVPost周三报道称。 这一举动是XPeng为解决机器人训练数据不足和生产瓶颈而采取的措施。
items.title_en: Tesla Rival Xpeng Expands Robotics Bet With Guangzhou Factory For Optimus Challenger IRON
items.summary_en: Xpeng Inc. (NYSE:XPEV) is set to break ground on its new humanoid robot factory in China as robotics takes center stage in the global tech industry. End Of 2026 Production Goal The company will begin work on its 1.18 million sq. ft. facility in Guangzhou, China, in the first quarter this year and is targeting large-scale production of its IRON humanoid robot by the end of the year, CnEVPost reported on Wednesday. The move comes as Xpeng plans to address insufficient training data and production

items.title:
我正在采取的3项投资行动，以应对衰退

在衰退前，我正在采取以下3项投资行动： 

1. 增加现金储备：我正在积累更多的现金，以应对可能的市场波动和投资损失。

2. 购买低估值股票：我正在寻找低估值的股票，价格低于其内在价值，准备在市场下跌时购买。

3. 投资于有息债券：我正在投资于有息债券，例如国债和公司债券，来获得稳定的回报并降低投资风险。
